key_themes: Defense and drone infrared optics demand surge
Black Diamond glass as domestic alternative to China-controlled Germanium
Record revenue growth (120% YoY), margin expansion, and ~$100M backlog
Consistent analyst Buy ratings with multiple price target increases
Strategic acquisitions, executive hires, and insider buying
summary: LPTH sentiment is strongly positive, driven by LightPath Technologies' critical role supplying precision optics and proprietary Black Diamond chalcogenide glass to major U.S. defense contractors (Lockheed, L3Harris, Anduril, Raytheon) for missiles, drones, and IR imaging — directly addressing China’s dominance of germanium supply chains.[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/LPTH/)[[2]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/LPTH/news/) Q2 FY2026 results showed record revenue of $16.4M (+120% YoY), gross profit up 212%, and a growing backlog near $100M, backed by repeated analyst Buy ratings, raised targets ($14–$15.50), strategic Amorphous Materials acquisition, new senior sales hires, and CEO insider purchases.[[3]](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/lightpath-technologies-reports-fiscal-2026-second-quarter-financial-results-302685505.html)[[4]](https://www.cnn.com/markets/stocks/LPTH) While the stock’s +600% run over the past year and recent sector rotation pullbacks have prompted valuation caution among some new buyers, investor discussions on X, Reddit, and news reflect high conviction in multi-year growth from defense, drones, and commercial expansion.[[5]](https://www.reddit.com/r/LightPathTechnologies/comments/1qdj7bx/lpth_daily_discussion_thread/)
sources: 15+ news articles (Yahoo Finance, PR Newswire, TipRanks, Seeking Alpha, MarketBeat), 20+ X posts (keyword + semantic search, Apr 2026 latest), Reddit r/LightPathTechnologies discussions and StockTwits community
